name: Full Barbell Gym
notes: Full commercial or well-equipped garage gym. Supports all modalities including Olympic lifting, gymnastics, and aerobic monostructural work.

name: Home — Kettlebell and Bodyweight
notes: Typical home setup without a barbell. Supports kettlebell ballistics, bodyweight strength, and aerobic work.

name: Bodyweight Only
notes: No external load. Supports gymnastics, calisthenics, and relative strength work.

name: Outdoor — Ruck Pack Only
notes: Field or travel setup with only a loaded ruck and open terrain. Supports rucking and bodyweight aerobic locomotion.

name: Home — Barbell Setup
notes: Home gym with a power rack and barbell. Supports all barbell compound lifts and kettlebell conditioning.
